overview: Gokaraju Rangaraju Institute of Engineering and Technology (GRIET), established in 1997 by the Gokaraju Rangaraju Educational Society, is a premier autonomous engineering college located in Bachupally, Hyderabad. It is widely recognized as one of the top-tier private engineering institutions in Telangana, known for its rigorous academic environment, high placement standards, and state-of-the-art research facilities. The college focuses on nurturing innovation through various student-run technical bodies and a strong industry-connect program.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with a prestigious 'A++' Grade (CGPA 3.55). Most eligible undergraduate programs are NBA accredited. Approved by AICTE and affiliated with JNTU-Hyderabad (JNTUH). Ranked #151 in the NIRF 2025 Engineering category.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, Data Science, CS&BS, IT, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + TG EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, DS, VLSI, Embedded Systems, Power Electronics, Structural Engg, DFM)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch with 55% aggregate + GATE / TG PGECET score

placements.avgSalary: ₹9.27 LPA (Recent cycle average); Overall median: ₹6.0 LPA

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions follow the rules of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TGCHE). 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via TG EAPCET state counseling. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE Main ranks. Counseling Code: GRRR.
admissions.importantDates: TG EAPCET 2026: May 9–11, 2026; Results: Mid-May 2026; TG PGECET 2026: June 10–13, 2026; Counseling: July 2026.

facilities: ICT Enabled Classrooms & Digital Classrooms in every block
Advanced AI/ML Research Lab & Specialized Tech Studios
Central Library with massive digital repository and specialized book bank
On-campus Girls Hostel (Capacity ~500); Private PGs nearby for Boys
Indoor Sports Complex & Outdoor Grounds (Cricket, Basketball)
Transport (Fleet of buses covering all major points in Hyderabad)
campus.specialNote: GRIET is distinguished by its 'Pragnya' technical fest and a very active professional body culture (IEEE, ISTE, CSI). It offers substantial merit scholarships: up to ₹1.2 Lakhs for EAPCET ranks below 500. The campus is known for its discipline and 'Ragging Free' environment.
